title: Pool
description: A pool resource that contains a group of backend server members used for load balancing traffic from virtual servers.

allowNat.description: Whether the pool can load balance NAT connections.

allowSnat.description: Whether the pool can load balance SNAT connections.

ignorePersistedWeight.description: Whether to ignore persisted weight when calculating load distribution.

ipTosToClient.description: Type of Service level for client-bound outgoing packets.

ipTosToServer.description: Type of Service level for server-bound outgoing packets.

linkQosToClient.description: QoS level for outgoing packets to clients.

linkQosToServer.description: QoS level for outgoing packets to servers.

loadBalancingMode.description: Load balancing algorithm used to distribute traffic.

minActiveMembers.description: Minimum number of active members for priority-group activation.

minUpMembers.description: Minimum number of operational pool members required before action is taken.

minUpMembersAction.description: Action to take when the number of operational members falls below the minimum.

minUpMembersChecking.description: Whether minimum member monitoring is enabled.

monitor.description: Health monitor or monitor rule applied to pool members. Specify multiple monitors with 'and' or 'min N of'.

queueDepthLimit.description: Maximum number of connections queued per member.

queueOnConnectionLimit.description: Whether to queue connections when limits are reached.

queueTimeLimit.description: Maximum time in milliseconds a connection can remain queued.

reselectTries.description: Number of reselection attempts after a passive failure.

serviceDownAction.description: Action to take when all pool members are unavailable.

slowRampTime.description: Time in seconds to gradually increase traffic to a newly enabled member.

membersReference.description: Reference to the pool members subcollection.
